description_long: This is a polished black granite grave monument consisting of a rectangular base and a slightly elevated platform, topped with a vertical headstone. The headstone features a prominent white Latin cross on the left side and several lines of engraved white text, including names and dates, which are clearly visible from the front. The surface of the grave is smooth and reflective, with a subtle speckled pattern typical of granite. The monument is solid and heavy, designed to be a permanent fixture in a cemetery or graveyard. The structure is simple yet dignified, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. There are no visible decorative elements aside from the cross and inscriptions.
description: A polished black granite grave monument with a vertical headstone featuring a white cross and engraved inscriptions. The structure is solid, smooth, and reflective, with a dignified and modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headstone with a white cross and detailed inscriptions, as well as the full length of the grave platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the grave platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the headstone and the grave platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headstone's profile and the continuous granite surface of the grave.
